nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 奧比群島
nodes.summary: 奧比群島是印度尼西亞的群島，位於布魯島和斯蘭島以北，北面有德那第島，南面有安汶島，行政方面由北摩鹿加省南哈马黑拉县負責管轄，最大島嶼是奧比島。

nodes.name: Red-tinged myzomela
nodes.summary: Red-tinged myzomela（Red-tinged myzomela，学名 Myzomela rubrotincta），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于世界鸟类学家联合会、奧比群島。

nodes.name: 世界鸟类学家联合会
nodes.summary: 世界鸟类学家联合会是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括Tasmanian boobook、Green parakeet、Fiery-capped manakin等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It was formerly considered a subspecies of the dusky myzomela (Myzomela obscura), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. It is found in the Obi Islands of Indonesia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It was formerly considered a subspecies of the dusky myzomela (Myzomela obscura), but was split as a distinct species by the IOC in 2021. It is found in the Obi Islands of Indonesia
